name: 乾
judgment: 乾：元亨。利贞。
tuanshu:
大哉乾元，万物资始，乃统天。云行雨施，品物流形，大明终始，六位时成。
时乘六龙以御天，乾道变化，各正性命，保合大和〈一作太和〉，乃利贞。
首出庶物，万国咸宁。
image:
天行健，君子以自强不息。
潜龙勿用，阳在下也。
见龙在田，德施普也。
终日乾乾，反复道也。
或跃在渊，进无咎也。
飞龙在天，大人造也。
亢龙有悔，盈不可久也。
interpretation: 纯粹阳刚之象，象征宇宙的原始创造力。问事宜主动出击，行事端正自可亨通；最忌犹豫不决、半途而废。
vernacular_judgment: 大吉大利，利于坚守正道。
vernacular_image: 天道刚健运行，君子应自强不息。
judgment_en: The Creative. Supreme success. Perseverance furthers.
image_en:
The movement of heaven is vigorous;
A nobleman should constantly strive to improve himself without cease.

The hidden dragon should not be acted upon,
For the yang is still beneath.

The dragon appears in the fields;
His virtue spreads universally.

Daily vigilance and perseverance,
Repeating the proper way.

Perhaps advancing, perhaps withdrawing into the abyss,
Progress without blame.

The flying dragon is in the heavens;
The great one arises.

The dragon at the heights has cause for regret,
For excess cannot be sustained.
tuanshu_en:
How great is the Creative Principle of Qian!
All things take their beginning from it, for it is the source that governs heaven.
Clouds move and rain descends; the various things are formed and shaped.
The great brightness begins and ends, the six positions are formed in their time.
Riding upon the six dragons, one governs the heavens.
The way of the Creative undergoes transformation;
Each thing receives its nature and its destiny.
Preserving the great harmony, it is favorable to be correct.
It brings forth the multitude of things; all kingdoms are at peace.
vernacular_judgment_en: Supreme success and great fortune; it benefits one to remain steadfast in the correct way.
vernacular_image_en: The way of heaven moves with vigor; a nobleman should constantly strengthen himself through unceasing self-improvement.
interpretation_en: A sign of pure yang and creative force, symbolizing the primal creative power of the universe. In matters, one should take the initiative and act decisively. Proper conduct brings success; the greatest error is hesitation and giving up halfway.

name: 坤
judgment: 坤：元亨。利牝马之贞。 君子有攸往，先迷后得主。 利西南得朋，东北丧朋。安贞，吉。
tuanshu:
至哉坤元，万物资生，乃顺承天。坤厚载物，德合无疆；含弘光大，品物咸亨。牝马地类，行地无疆，柔顺利贞。
君子攸行，先迷失道，后顺得常。
西南得朋，乃与类行，东北丧朋，乃终有庆。安贞之吉，应地无疆。
image:
地势坤，君子以厚德载物。
履霜坚冰，阴始凝也。驯致其道，至坚冰也。
六二之动，直以方也。不习无不利，地道光也。
含章可贞，以时发也。或从王事，知光大也。
括囊无咎，慎不害也。
黄裳元吉，文在中也。
龙战于野，其道穷也。
interpretation: 厚德载物之象，宜静守、协助、配合他人。刚强易折，柔韧方能持久。问事守拙待时，反而胜过强行出头。
vernacular_judgment: 大吉大利，利于母马的柔顺之德，君子有所往先迷后得主。
vernacular_image: 大地厚德载物，君子应厚德容物。
judgment_en: The Receptive. Supreme success. It benefits to follow the feminine principle.
tuanshu_en:
How ultimate is the Receptive Principle of Kun!
All things receive life from it, for it follows and receives the mandates of heaven.
The earth is thick and bears all things; its virtue knows no limits.
It contains, expands, and brightens; all things are harmonized.
The mare belongs to the class of earth; traversing the earth without limit, gentle and favorable for correctness.
A nobleman goes forth; first he loses the way, then he follows and obtains constancy.
In the southwest he finds friends, going with his kind.
In the northeast he loses friends, yet ultimately there is joy.
The good fortune of peaceful correctness corresponds to the earth without limits.
vernacular_judgment_en: Supreme success and great fortune; favorable for the yielding virtue of the mare. A nobleman going forth first goes astray then finds his lord.
vernacular_image_en: The earth is generous in bearing things; a nobleman should cultivate virtue to bear all things.
interpretation_en: A sign of bearing and carriage; suitable for stillness, assistance, and cooperation with others. What is rigid is easily broken; what is flexible endures. In matters, waiting quietly surpasses forcing ahead.

name: 屯
judgment: 屯：元亨，利贞。勿用有攸往，利建侯。
tuanshu: 屯，刚柔始交而难生，动乎险中，大亨贞。雷雨之动满盈，天造草昧，宜建侯而不宁。
image:
云雷，屯；君子以经纶。
虽磐桓，志行正也。以贵下贱，大得民也。
六二之难，乘刚也。十年乃字，反常也。
即鹿无虞，以从禽也。君子舍之，往吝穷也。
求而往，明也。
屯其膏，施未光也。
泣血涟如，何可长也。
interpretation: 万物始生却困于险中，如创业初期或新关系的磨合阶段。不宜冒进，先站稳脚跟、建立基础比扩张更重要。
vernacular_judgment: 万事开头难，利于建国封侯，不轻易出手。
vernacular_image: 云雷屯积，君子应经纶天下事。
judgment_en: Difficulty at the Beginning. Supreme success. Perseverance furthers. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go.
tuanshu_en:
Difficulty at the Beginning: yang and yin first interchange and difficulty is born.
Movement in the midst of danger brings great success and correctness.
Thunder and rain fill the sky;
Heaven establishes things in confusion.
It is fitting to establish feudal lords but not to seek rest.
vernacular_judgment_en: All things are difficult at the beginning; favorable for establishing feudal lords and ennobling nobles, not acting hastily.
vernacular_image_en: Clouds and thunder are pent up; a nobleman should arrange the affairs of the world.
interpretation_en: All things are born yet trapped in danger, like the early stages of entrepreneurship or a new relationship. One should not rush forward; establishing a firm foundation before expansion is essential.

name: 蒙
judgment: 蒙：亨。匪我求童蒙，童蒙求我。初筮告，再三渎，渎则不告。利贞。
tuanshu: 蒙，山下有险，险而止，蒙。蒙亨，以亨行，时中也。匪我求童蒙，童蒙求我，志应也。初筮告，以刚中也。再三渎，渎则不告，渎蒙也。蒙以养正，圣功也。
image:
山下出泉，蒙；君子以果行育德。
利用刑人，以正法也。
子克家，刚柔接也。
勿用取女，行不顺也。
困蒙之吝，独远实也。
童蒙之吉，顺以巽也。
利御寇，上下顺也。
interpretation: 蒙昧待开之象，强调教育和自我觉醒。问学业、求师、起步阶段最合适；忌自以为是，多向有经验者请教。
vernacular_judgment: 我并非求童蒙，童蒙求我。利于占卜。
vernacular_image: 山下出泉水，君子以果敢行为培育品德。
judgment_en: Youthful Folly. Success. I go to seek the childish folly, not the other way around.
image_en:
Beneath the mountain, springs emerge—this is Youthful Folly;
A nobleman should act decisively to cultivate virtue.

It is beneficial to use punishment to instruct people, thereby correcting the law.

A son can manage a household through the meeting of yin and yang.

Do not take a wife; her conduct is not smooth.

The sorrow of being trapped in folly comes from being alone far from substance.

The good fortune of childish folly comes from yielding and smooth compliance.

It is beneficial to defend against invaders; those above and below comply.
tuanshu_en:
Youthful Folly: beneath the mountain there is danger, yet one stops—Folly.
Folly is successful because one acts in accordance with timing.
It is not I who seek childish folly; childish folly seeks me—their wills respond.
The first divination tells—the yang is in the center.
Repeated divination is irreverent; irreverence means not telling, for it is irreverent folly.
To cultivate correctness in folly is the sacred work.
vernacular_judgment_en: It is not I who seek childish folly; childish folly seeks me. It is beneficial to divine.
vernacular_image_en: Beneath the mountain, springs emerge; a nobleman should cultivate virtue through decisive action.
interpretation_en: A sign of folly awaiting enlightenment, emphasizing education and self-awakening. Best for matters of study, seeking teachers, or getting started. One should avoid thinking one knows everything and consult those with experience.

name: 需
judgment: 需：有孚，光亨。贞吉，利涉大川。
tuanshu: 需，须也，险在前也；刚健而不陷，其义不困穷矣。需，有孚，光亨，贞吉，位乎天位，以正中也。利涉大川，往有功也。
image:
云上于天，需；君子以饮食宴乐。
需于郊，不犯难行也。利用恒，无咎，未失常也。
需于沙，衍在中也。虽小有言，以终吉也。
需于泥，灾在外也。自我致寇，敬慎不败也。
需于血，顺以听也。
酒食，贞吉，以中正也。
不速之客来，敬之终吉。虽不当位，未大失也。
interpretation: 云上于天未降雨，需耐心等待时机的样子。当前所求时机未到，强行推进反而生乱。保持饮食有节、心情放松，吉。
vernacular_judgment: 心怀诚信，光亨贞吉，利于涉越大川。
vernacular_image: 云上于天，君子应饮食安乐，蓄势待发。
judgment_en: Waiting. Sincerity brings light and success. Perseverance brings good fortune.
image_en:
Clouds above heaven—this is Waiting;
A nobleman should find joy in food and drink while awaiting the timing.

Waiting in the suburbs means not daring to travel the difficult path.
It is beneficial to have constancy—no blame, for nothing is lost.

Waiting in the sand spreads in the center.
Although there is some criticism, ultimately good fortune.

Waiting in the mud brings danger outside.
Bringing bandits upon oneself, yet caution ensures defeat.

Waiting in the blood means yielding and listening.

Food and drink, correct and auspicious, because of the middle and correct.

Uninvited guests arrive; treating them with respect brings ultimate good fortune.
Although not in proper position, there is no great loss.
tuanshu_en:
Waiting means needing, for danger lies ahead.
Yet being strong and healthy, one does not fall into the trap—the meaning is not exhausted.
Waiting, with sincerity, brings bright success and correct auspiciousness.
One occupies the heavenly position, being correct and in the center.
It is beneficial to cross the great stream; going brings success.
vernacular_judgment_en: With sincerity, bright success and correct auspiciousness; beneficial to cross the great stream.
vernacular_image_en: Clouds above heaven; a nobleman should find joy in food and drink while gathering strength for the timing.
interpretation_en: Clouds above heaven but no rain falls—waiting for the timing. What is sought has not yet arrived; forcing forward brings disorder. Maintaining proper diet and calm mood brings good fortune.

name: 讼
judgment: 讼：有孚，窒，惕，中吉，终凶。利见大人，不利涉大川。
tuanshu: 讼，上刚下险，险而健，讼。讼，有孚，窒，惕，中吉，刚来而得中也。终凶，讼不可成也。利见大人，尚中正也。不利涉大川，入于渊也。
image:
天与水违行，讼；君子以作事谋始。
不永所事，讼不可长也。虽小有言，其辩明也。
不克讼，归逋窜也。自下讼上，患至掇也。
食旧德，从上吉也。
复即命渝，安贞，不失也。
讼，元吉，以中正也。
以讼受服，亦不足敬也。
interpretation: 刚险相争之象，提示诉讼、口舌纷争。问事多为不利，宜退让、调解、避免正面冲突。能不动则不动。
vernacular_judgment: 有诚信而被窒碍，警惕终吉，利于见大人，不利于涉水。
vernacular_image: 天与水违行，君子以谋事之始慎防争端。
judgment_en: Conflict. Sincerity and blocked; caution brings middle success. The end is misfortune.
image_en:
Heaven and water move in opposite directions—this is Conflict;
A nobleman should plan the beginning of affairs to prevent dispute.

The matter is not prolonged—conflict should not grow.
Although there is some criticism, the argument becomes clear.

Unable to engage in conflict, one flees and conceals himself.
One below conflicts with one above; disaster comes voluntarily.

Partaking of old virtue, following above brings good fortune.

Returning to one's fate and changing, peacefully correct, one does not lose.

Conflict, greatly auspicious, because of the middle and correct.

Receiving honor through conflict brings no respect.
tuanshu_en:
Conflict: above is strong and dangerous, below is dangerous, yet strong—Conflict.
Conflict, with sincerity, is obstructed; caution brings middle success.
Ultimately misfortune—for conflict cannot succeed.
It is beneficial to see a great person, for the middle and correct are valued.
It is not beneficial to cross the great stream, for one falls into the abyss.
vernacular_judgment_en: With sincerity yet obstructed; caution brings ultimate good fortune. It is beneficial to see a great person; not beneficial to cross water.
vernacular_image_en: Heaven and water move in opposite directions; a nobleman should plan the beginning of affairs carefully to prevent conflict.
interpretation_en: A sign of strong and dangerous forces in opposition, warning of lawsuits and disputes. Matters are generally unfavorable—retreat, mediation, and avoiding direct conflict are advised. If possible, do not act.

name: 师
judgment: 师：贞丈人吉，无咎。
tuanshu: 师，众也。贞，正也。能以众正，可以王矣。刚中而应，行险而顺，以此毒天下，而民从之，吉又何咎矣。
image:
地中有水，师；君子以容民畜众。
师出以律；失律，凶也。
在师中吉，承天宠也。王三锡命，怀万邦也。
师或舆尸，大无功也。
左次无咎，未失常也。
长子帅师，以中行也。弟子舆尸，使不当也。
大君有命，以正功也。小人勿用，必乱邦也。
interpretation: 聚众而行之象，战争或团队协作的象征。问事有利但需严明纪律、有核心统帅；无组织纪律则凶。
vernacular_judgment: 贞正，成年人吉，无咎。
vernacular_image: 地中有水，君子以容民畜众。
judgment_en: The Army. Correctness brings success. The leader should be the mature person.
image_en:
Water is within the earth—this is The Army;
A nobleman should gather the people in his heart and nurture the multitude.

The army goes out with discipline; without discipline, misfortune.

Being in the army with good fortune, receiving heaven's favor.
The king bestows three mandates, embracing all states.

The army may carry the dead—no great success.

Retreating to the left brings no blame, for nothing is lost.

The eldest son commands the army, acting correctly;
The younger son carries the dead—appointments are improper.

The great lord issues orders, correcting merit.
The petty person should not be used, for it will surely disorder the state.
tuanshu_en:
The Army: the multitude. Correctness means alignment.
One who can align the multitude may rule as king.
The center is strong and responds; moving through danger and compliance, using this to harmonize the world, the people follow—good fortune. What blame is there?
vernacular_judgment_en: Correctness brings success; the leader should be the mature person—no blame.
vernacular_image_en: Water is within the earth; a nobleman should gather the people and nurture the multitude.
interpretation_en: A sign of the multitude acting together—a symbol of war or team cooperation. Matters are favorable but require strict discipline and a core leader; without organization and discipline, misfortune.

name: 比
judgment: 比：吉。原筮元永贞，无咎。不宁方来，后夫凶。
tuanshu: 比，吉也。比，辅也，下顺从也。原筮，元永贞，无咎，以刚中也。不宁方来，上下应也。后夫凶，其道穷也。
image:
地上有水，比；先王以建万国，亲诸侯。
比之初六，有它吉也。
比之自内，不自失也。
比之匪人，不亦伤乎！
外比于贤，以从上也。
显比之吉，位正中也。舍逆取顺，失前禽也。邑人不诫，上使中也。
比之无首，无所终也。
interpretation: 亲附辅佐之象，提示找到对的人、加入对的圈子。问合作、择业、择偶皆吉，但需以诚信为本、不结党营私。
vernacular_judgment: 吉，原占卜永贞无咎，不安宁的事同时到来，后至者凶。
vernacular_image: 地上有水，先王以建万国，亲诸侯。
judgment_en: Holding Together. Complete success. The original divination brings lasting correctness and no blame.
image_en:
There is water above the earth—this is Holding Together;
Former kings established feudal lords and cherished the nobles.

Holding together at the beginning brings other good fortune.

Holding together from within, not losing oneself.

Holding together with improper people—does one not grieve?

Externally compare with the worthy, following those above.

The manifest holding together is auspicious, being in the correct center.
Abandoning the reverse and taking the compliant means losing the preceding prey.

The people of the city need not be warned; the ruler uses the middle.

Holding together without a head has no end.
tuanshu_en:
Holding Together brings auspiciousness. Holding Together means assisting, for those below comply.
Original divination: original and eternal correctness brings no blame, for the strong one is in the center.
Those not at peace come from all directions—those above and below respond.
The one who arrives late faces misfortune, for the way is exhausted.
vernacular_judgment_en: Auspicious; original divination of eternal correctness and no blame. Unease comes from all directions; the latecomer is unfortunate.
vernacular_image_en: There is water above the earth; former kings established many feudal lords and cherished the nobles.
interpretation_en: A sign of union and assistance, suggesting finding the right person and joining the right circle. Cooperation, career choice, or marriage matters are all favorable, but sincerity must be the foundation—no cliques or factionalism.

name: 小畜
judgment: 小畜：亨。密云不雨，自我西郊。
tuanshu: 小畜，柔得位而上下应之，曰小畜。健而巽，刚中而志行，乃亨。密云不雨，尚往也。自我西郊，施未行也。
image:
风行天上，小畜，君子以懿文德。
复自道，其义吉也。
牵复在中，亦不自失也。
夫妻反目，不能正室也。
有孚。惕出。上合志也。
有孚挛如，不独富也。
既雨既处，德积载也。君子征凶，有所疑也。
interpretation: 风行天上、密云不雨之象。当前实力尚不足以完全施展，但也不必沮丧——小规模积累就能成事。节制欲望是核心。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，密云不雨，来自我西郊。
vernacular_image: 风行天上，君子以懿文德。
judgment_en: Small Taming. Success. Dense clouds but no rain from our western outskirts.
image_en:
Wind moves beneath heaven—this is Small Taming;
A nobleman should cultivate literary virtue.

Returning to one's way isauspicious by meaning.

Being led back to the center, also not losing oneself.

Husband and wife turn their eyes cannot correct the household.

With sincerity, caution emerges; above aligns with will.

With sincerity, tied firmly, not solely enriching oneself.

Both rain and ceased—virtue accumulates and is laden.
A nobleman's campaign brings misfortune; there is doubt.
tuanshu_en:
Small Taming: the yielding has achieved its position and those above and below respond—this is called Small Taming.
Strong yet yielding, the strong one is in the center and the will is fulfilled, thus success.
Dense clouds but no rain—still going forth.
From my western outskirts, the effect has not yet spread.
vernacular_judgment_en: Success. Dense clouds but no rain from our western outskirts.
vernacular_image_en: Wind moves beneath heaven; a nobleman should cultivate literary virtue.
interpretation_en: Wind beneath heaven, dense clouds but no rain—current strength is insufficient to fully manifest, yet there is no need for despair—small-scale accumulation accomplishes things. Restraining desires is essential.

name: 履
judgment: 履虎尾，不咥人，亨。
tuanshu: 履，柔履刚也。说而应乎乾，是以履虎尾，不咥人，亨。刚中正，履帝位而不疚，光明也。
image:
上天下泽，履；君子以辨上下，定民志。
素履之往，独行愿也。
幽人贞吉，中不自乱也。
眇能视，不足以有明也。跛能履，不足以与行也。咥人之凶，位不当也。武人为于大君，志刚也。
愬愬终吉，志行也。
夬履贞厉，位正当也。
元吉在上，大有庆也。
interpretation: 踩虎尾而不被咬之象，提示行事务必谨慎、礼数周全。问事可成，但要时刻警觉、言行有度，不可张扬。
vernacular_judgment: 履虎尾，不咥人，亨通。
vernacular_image: 上天下泽，君子以辨上下，定民志。
judgment_en: Treading. Treading on the tiger's tail; it does not bite. Success.
image_en:
Heaven above, marshes below—this is Treading;
A nobleman distinguishes matters clearly and arranges proper order.

Treading on the tail of the tiger, it does not bite—beginning auspiciousness.

One who treads with care walks with stepwise progress.

Treading on empty ground is not one's fault; one's will is single.

Treading correctly brings good fortune, for it is a single experience.

Treading firmly isAUSPICIOUS and correct.

Treading one's own ground is not a foot of walking—but it is correct.

If one treads and cries 'beware,' it is not yet the time for great progress.
tuanshu_en:
Treading: above is happy and strong, below is frightening and yielding, yet happily treading—Treading.
Treading brings auspiciousness when one conducts oneself properly.
Going brings good fortune, for it is correct and single.
One treads on the tail of the tiger, but it does not bite—the middle and correct.
It is beneficial to make sacrifices and cross the great stream.
vernacular_judgment_en: Treading on the tail of the tiger; it does not bite—beginning auspiciousness. Going brings good fortune.
vernacular_image_en: Heaven above, marshes below; a nobleman should distinguish matters clearly and maintain proper conduct.
interpretation_en: A sign of treading carefully with awareness. One should maintain caution while proceeding, recognizing that there are risks that require careful handling. Proper conduct brings success.

name: 泰
judgment: 泰：小往大来，吉亨。
tuanshu: 泰，小往大来，吉亨。则是天地交而万物通也，上下交而其志同也。内阳而外阴，内健而外顺，内君子而外小人，君子道长，小人道消也。
image:
天地交，泰；后以财成天地之道，辅相天地之宜，以左右民。
拔茅征吉，志在外也。
包荒，得尚于中行，以光大也。
无往不复，天地际也。
翩翩不富，皆失实也。不戒以孚，中心愿也。
以祉，元吉。中以行愿也。
城复于隍，其命乱也。
interpretation: 天地相交、阴阳和合之象，万事亨通。但要记住泰极而否来，盛时不可忘形——保持开放、谦逊，泰才能持久。
vernacular_judgment: 小往大来，吉，亨通。
vernacular_image: 天地交泰，后以财成天地之道。
judgment_en: Peace. Small goes, great comes. Good fortune and success.
image_en:
Heaven above, earth below—this is Peace;
Former kings established and cultivated proper conduct toward the people.

The ascending dragon's tail is lost—no error.

Flying dragons hide in the wilderness—do not use.

Horse of good fortune comes from above—no blame, returning.

Going to get the unicorn from the wilderness—each gains what they seek.

The phoenix drinks from the pool—fortune comes from within.

The wall falls into the city pit—do not use troops.

The cycle of heaven returns—the way of the ruler.
tuanshu_en:
Peace: the great ruler arises and nourishes all things between heaven and earth.
The six lines move in proper order—the strong and yielding each achieve their position.
The way of heaven and earth connects—the ruler's virtue is complete.
The rain falls and moistens—all is in proper balance.
vernacular_judgment_en: Great success; it benefits correctness. The small goes and the great returns—good fortune and blessing come naturally.
vernacular_image_en: Heaven above and earth below; former kings cultivated proper conduct toward the people, establishing and nourishing all things.
interpretation_en: A sign of harmony and peace—the ideal state. Everything is in proper order and balance. However, this is a transitional phase; as the hexagram changes, difficulty may follow. Cherish the current peace while remaining vigilant.

name: 否
judgment: 否之匪人，不利君子贞，大往小来。
tuanshu: 否之匪人，不利君子贞，大往小来。则是天地不交而万物不通也，上下不交而天下无邦也。内阴而外阳，内柔而外刚，内小人而外君子，小人道长，君子道消也。
image:
天地不交，否；君子以俭德辟难，不可荣以禄。
拔茅贞吉，志在君也。
大人否，亨。不乱群也。
包羞，位不当也。
有命无咎，志行也。
大人之吉，位正当也。
否终则倾，何可长也。
interpretation: 天地不交、阴阳隔绝之象，提示当前大环境不利。宜静守内省、保存实力，等待否极泰来。强行出头必败。
vernacular_judgment: 否之匪人，不利君子贞，大往小来。
vernacular_image: 天地不交，否，君子以俭德辟难。
judgment_en: Standstill. Not favorable for superior people. Great goes, small comes.
image_en:
Heaven above, earth below—this is Standstill;
Ignoble people use it to advance their cause; noble people use it to withdraw.

The grasshopper does not have what it ties—it jumps away.

The incipientStandstill is not a level—good fortune comes from the host.

"Standstill" means stopped—do not test the water.

The stopped horse slides—remorse.

The stopped man plugs his nostrils—remorse.

The stopped man is in the dark—calamity.
tuanshu_en:
Standstill: the strong are above and the yielding are below—separated and not joining.
Standing still in darkness, the yielding gains strength.
Those who seek the standstill should be firm and not be confused.
Standstill benefits the firm but harms the yielding.
vernacular_judgment_en: Standstill. Ignoble people use it to advance; noble people use it to withdraw.
vernacular_image_en: Heaven above, earth below; things are separated and do not join. Noble people withdraw to wait for the timing.
interpretation_en: A sign of blockage and stagnation—the obstruction of heaven and earth. This is not the time for action. Noble people should retreat and wait; forcing forward brings loss. The key is patience and conservation of energy.

name: 同人
judgment: 同人于野，亨。 利涉大川，利君子贞。
tuanshu: 同人，柔得位得中，而应乎乾，曰同人。同人曰，同人于野，亨。利涉大川，乾行也。文明以健，中正而应，君子正也。唯君子为能通天下之志。
image:
天与火，同人；君子以类族辨物。
出门同人，又谁咎也。
同人于宗，吝道也。
伏戎于莽，敌刚也。三岁不兴，安行也。
乘其墉，义弗克也，其吉，则困而反则也。
同人之先，以中直也。大师相遇，言相克也。
同人于郊，志未得也。
interpretation: 众人同心之象，问合作、共事、团队建设大吉。关键是找对人——志同道合者才能真正同行。
vernacular_judgment: 同人于野，亨通，利于涉大川，利于君子贞。
vernacular_image: 天与火，同人，君子以类族辨物。
judgment_en: Fellowship. Success in the open country. It is beneficial to cross the great river.
image_en:
Fire above, heaven below—this is Fellowship;
Former kings established covenants and met at the northern gate.

The fellowship in the wilds—good fortune, no blame.

The fellowship in the heart—remorse disappears.

The fellowship with the drum—advancing, like a war.

The fellowship on the wall—third person, correct.

The fellowship in the wilds—remorse disappears, no blame.

The fellowship at the head—remorse.
tuanshu_en:
Fellowship with others in the open: the strong one is in the center and responds to those above.
United as one, they go through difficulty and danger.
The fellowship is correct—others follow.
Fellowship in the wilderness, the fellowship is not established—how can this last?
vernacular_judgment_en: Fellowship with others in the open. It benefits to cross the great stream; it benefits to see great people.
vernacular_image_en: Fire above heaven; former kings established covenants and met at the open gates to unite with all.
interpretation_en: A sign of fellowship and unity with others in the open. This is a time for cooperation with like-minded people and working together toward common goals. Success requires unity and shared purpose.

name: 大有
judgment: 大有：元亨。
tuanshu: 大有，柔得尊位，大中而上下应之，曰大有。其德刚健而文明，应乎天而时行，是以元亨。
image:
火在天上，大有；君子以遏恶扬善，顺天休命。
大有初九，无交害也。
大车以载，积中不败也。
公用亨于天子，小人害也。
匪其彭，无咎；明辨晰也。
厥孚交如，信以发志也。威如之吉，易而无备也。
大有上吉，自天佑也。
interpretation: 盛大丰收之象，问财运、事业皆大吉。但要记住满招损——分享、回馈、谦逊才能守住这份丰盛。
vernacular_judgment: 大有，元亨。
vernacular_image: 火在天上，大有，君子以遏恶扬善。
judgment_en: Great Possession. Supreme success.
image_en:
Fire above, mountain below—this is Possession in Great measure;
The nobleman extinguishes evil and promotes good, following the course of heaven.

The no-fault arrangement is in the no-place—his virtue is not hidden.

The great wagon is loaded—nothing cannot be borne.

The beneficent presents—the gentleman is not jealous.

He who possesses great measure is not yet a king; the hundred arrows attack.

The prince presents as tribute—the king grants fiefdom.

The heaven's possession is in the fire—the correct course.
tuanshu_en:
Possession in Great measure: the yielding is in the center and responds to the strong above.
Strong and central, the will is fulfilled—great success.
Possessing the great measure, it benefits correctness.
The hidden dragon should not be acted upon—this is not yet the time.
vernacular_judgment_en: Great success; hidden dragon should not be acted upon.
vernacular_image_en: Fire above the mountain; the nobleman extinguishes evil and promotes good, following the course of heaven.
interpretation_en: A sign of great treasure and abundance. Great resources bring great responsibility. One should use this abundance wisely and virtuously, sharing with others and maintaining proper conduct.

name: 谦
judgment: 谦：亨，君子有终。
tuanshu: 谦，亨，天道下济而光明，地道卑而上行。天道亏盈而益谦，地道变盈而流谦，鬼神害盈而福谦，人道恶盈而好谦。谦尊而光，卑而不可逾，君子之终也。
image:
地中有山，谦；君子以裒多益寡，称物平施。
谦谦君子，卑以自牧也。
鸣谦贞吉，中心得也。
劳谦君子，万民服也。
无不利㧑谦；不违则也。
利用侵伐，征不服也。
鸣谦，志未得也。可用行师，征邑国也。
interpretation: 六爻皆吉的难得之卦，唯一一卦卦辞六爻无凶。问事大吉，越是谦下者越能聚人成事，是处世的最高境界。
vernacular_judgment: 谦，亨通，君子有终。
vernacular_image: 地中有山，谦，君子以裒多益寡。
judgment_en: Modesty. Success. The superior person has a final result.
image_en:
Earth above, mountain below—this is Modesty;
The nobleman reduces the excess and supplements the deficiency.

The modest one's crossing isauspicious.

The modest one's content isauspicious and correct—the gentleman ends a hundred wars.

The modest one's calling—no blame.

The modest one'sUse brings good fortune—action is without blame.

The modest one's campaign—nothing not beneficial.

The modest one'sUse is for arousing—the gentleman uses it to move the army.
tuanshu_en:
Modesty: the yielding is in the center and responds to the strong above, and below it is humble.
Modest and correct, the gentleman achieves success through humility.
Modesty moves the army—the gentleman uses it to arouse the multitude.
vernacular_judgment_en: Modesty brings success. The gentleman accomplishes the hundred wars.
vernacular_image_en: Earth above the mountain; the nobleman reduces the excess and supplements the deficiency.
interpretation_en: A sign of humility and modesty—the virtue that brings success. Despite being capable, one maintains humility. This leads to trust and support from others. The modest person can accomplish great things.

name: 豫
judgment: 豫：利建侯行师。
tuanshu: 豫，刚应而志行，顺以动，豫。豫，顺以动，故天地如之，而况建侯行师乎？天地以顺动，故日月不过，而四时不忒；圣人以顺动，则刑罚清而民服。豫之时义大矣哉！
image: 雷出地奋，豫。先王以作乐崇德，殷荐之上帝，以配祖考。
interpretation: 雷出地奋、万物欣然之象。但欢乐中要保持警觉——豫（预备）也意味着行动前的准备阶段，不宜在享乐中丧失判断。
vernacular_judgment: 利于建国封侯，出师征战。
vernacular_image: 雷出地奋，豫，先王以作乐崇德。
judgment_en: Enthusiasm. It is beneficial to establish rulers and dispatch armies.
image_en:
Thunder above, earth below—this is Enthusiasm;
Former kings made music to honor virtue and reverently served their ancestors.

Enthusiastic and advancing—this isauspicious.

Enthusiastic and firm—good fortune, no blame.

The enthusiast looks back—remorse.

Enthusiastic in the great action—no blame.

The sick from enthusiasm—do not use medicine, it will heal itself.

The enthusiast's army should be opposed—correct andauspicious.

"Supreme" means the greatest; "stop" means restraining.
tuanshu_en:
Enthusiasm: thunder rises from the earth—great sway and movement.
The former kings delighted in virtue and served their ancestors.
Enthusiasm for the great cause—the gentleman should act decisively.
Do not set up armies for selfish reasons—self-will brings misfortune.
vernacular_judgment_en: Enthusiasm. It benefits to set up armies and cause others to act.
vernacular_image_en: Thunder above the earth; former kings made music to honor virtue and served their ancestors with reverence.
interpretation_en: A sign of enthusiasm and excitation—time of great movement and momentum. This is the time to act decisively and rally others. However, one must act for righteous purposes, not selfish gain.

name: 随
judgment: 随：元亨。利贞。无咎。
tuanshu: 随，刚来而下柔，动而说，随。大亨贞，无咎，而天下随时，随之时义大矣哉！
image:
泽中有雷，随；君子以向晦入宴息。
官有渝，从正吉也。出门交有功，不失也。
系小子，弗兼与也。
系丈夫，志舍下也。
随有获，其义凶也。有孚在道，明功也。
孚于嘉，吉；位正中也。
拘系之，上穷也。
interpretation: 随人之后、随机应变之象。问事宜跟随明者、能者，灵活调整方向。盲目跟从则凶，择善而从则吉。
vernacular_judgment: 随，元亨，利贞，无咎。
vernacular_image: 泽中有雷，随，君子以向晦入宴息。
judgment_en: Following. Supreme success. Perseverance brings good fortune. No blame.
image_en:
Lake above, thunder below—this is Following;
The nobleman uses the night for rest—when the time comes, they act.

Following with the fox—auspicious.

Following and leaving the household—remorse.

Following and retaining—what blame?

Following and correct—good fortune, no blame.

The sincerity of following—auspicious.

The king uses it to capture the city—but not the people.
tuanshu_en:
Following: the yielding is in the center and responds to the strong above.
Following with sincerity—central and correct.
Following in the center is auspicious—the gentleman obeys the time and advances.
vernacular_judgment_en: Following. Success. It benefits to cross the great stream; it benefits to be correct.
vernacular_image_en: Lake above thunder; the nobleman uses rest and stillness, then acts when the time comes.
interpretation_en: A sign of following and seeking guidance from others. One should find the right teacher or leader to follow. This brings success when following someone capable and virtuous.

name: 蛊
judgment: 蛊：元亨。利涉大川。先甲三日，后甲三日。
tuanshu: 蛊，刚上而柔下，巽而止，蛊。蛊，元亨，而天下治也。利涉大川，往有事也。先甲三日，后甲三日，终则有始，天行也。
image:
山下有风，蛊；君子以振民育德。
干父之蛊，意承考也。
干母之蛊，得中道也。
干父之蛊，终无咎也。
裕父之蛊，往未得也。
干父用誉，承以德也。
不事王侯，志可则也。
interpretation: 坏乱待整治之象，提示接手烂摊子或修复旧问题。问事虽难但有转机——勇于担责、革新除弊，反可成事。
vernacular_judgment: 蛊，元亨，利涉大川，甲前三日，甲后三日。
vernacular_image: 山下有风，蛊，君子以振民育德。
judgment_en: Work on What Has Been Spoiled. Supreme success. It is beneficial to cross the great river.
image_en:
Mountain above, wind below—this is Work on What Has Been Spoiled;
The nobleman encourages the people to labor and urges them to action.

Work on the spoiled's beginning—child's work—auspicious.

Work on the spoiled's overcoming—auspicious.

Work on the spoiled's third—no blame.

Work on the spoiled's fourth—remorse disappears.

Work on the spoiled's fifth—remorse disappears, good fortune.

Not eating, working on the top—the gentleman removes death.

Not acting—heaven's work.
tuanshu_en:
Work on What Has Been Spoiled: the yielding moves and responds to the strong above.
Work on the spoiled, removing corruption—correct and auspicious.
What is spoiled can be remedied—perseverance brings good fortune.
vernacular_judgment_en: Work on What Has Been Spoiled. Success. It benefits to be correct; in seven days one obtains the result.
vernacular_image_en: Mountain above wind; the nobleman encourages the people to work and urges them to action.
interpretation_en: A sign of repairing what has been corrupted—restoration and reform. This is the time to correct past mistakes and fix problems. With proper approach, success is achievable.

name: 临
judgment: 临：元亨。利贞。至于八月有凶。
tuanshu: 临，刚浸而长。说而顺，刚中而应，大亨以正，天之道也。至于八月有凶，消不久也。
image:
泽上有地，临；君子以教思无穷，容保民无疆。
咸临贞吉，志行正也。
咸临，吉无不利；未顺命也。
甘临，位不当也。既忧之，咎不长也。
至临无咎，位当也。
大君之宜，行中之谓也。
敦临之吉，志在内也。
interpretation: 阳气渐长、君子临民之象，提示上升期已至。问事宜主动把握、积极行动，但要守正道、以德感化而非威压。
vernacular_judgment: 临，元亨，利贞，至于八月有凶。
vernacular_image: 泽上有地，临，君子以教思无穷。
judgment_en: Approach. Supreme success. Perseverance brings good fortune. In the eighth month there will be misfortune.
image_en:
Earth above, lake below—this is Approach;
The nobleman cultivates virtue and prepares for the end.

The approach's first—auspicious, no blame, continuing.

The approach's second—auspicious, correct—great person's approach.

The approach's third—close approaching—repose, but anxiety.

The approach's fourth—advancing, jumping—auspicious.

The approach's fifth—good fortune, no blame—the king presents, the blind receive sight.

The approach's top—"All is at peace"—the old man's trust.
tuanshu_en:
Approach: the yielding is in the center and responds to the strong above.
Approach, correct and auspicious—the great person comes.
Approaching with sincerity is Auspicious—the gentleman accepts the time.
vernacular_judgment_en: Approach. Success. It benefits to be correct; in the end, no blame.
vernacular_image_en: Earth above the lake; the nobleman cultivates virtue and prepares for what is to come.
interpretation_en: A sign of gradual approach and advance toward success. The time is right for advancement. One should advance with proper conduct and sincerity. Success will come through steady progress.

name: 观
judgment: 观：盥而不荐，有孚颙若。
tuanshu: 大观在上，顺而巽，中正以观天下。观，盥而不荐，有孚颙若，下观而化也。观天之神道，而四时不忒，圣人以神道设教，而天下服矣。
image: 风行地上，观；先王以省方，观民设教。
interpretation: 风行地上、万物可观之象。当前宜多观察、多体悟，反观内心。问决策、择人，先看清全局再行动。
vernacular_judgment: 盥而不荐，有孚颙若。
vernacular_image: 风行地上，观，先王以省方观民设教。
judgment_en: Contemplation. The ablution has been performed, but not yet the offering. Sincere, as if standing on high.
image_en:
Wind above, earth below—this is Contemplation;
The ancient kings observed the people and cultivated themselves to influence them.

The boy seeing the girl is not good for marriage—long-lasting misfortune.

Contemplation of my skin—shame.

Contemplation of my life—self-examination.

Contemplation of the noble'sAus—accepting the guests.

Contemplation of my person—bowing.

Contemplation of one's mouth—speaking brings ruin.
tuanshu_en:
Contemplation: the wind moves over the earth—penetrating and observing.
The ancient kings observed the people and cultivated themselves to influence them.
Looking upward to contemplate the signs—observing the virtue of heaven.
Looking downward to contemplate the forms—observing the things of earth.
vernacular_judgment_en: Contemplation. The ablution is not yet finished, but the offering is already performed—the attitude of reverence.
vernacular_image_en: Wind above the earth; the ancient kings observed the people and cultivated themselves to influence them.
interpretation_en: A sign of contemplation and observation—this is the time for careful observation and reflection before action. One should study the situation thoroughly and understand the signs before proceeding.

name: 噬嗑
judgment: 噬嗑：亨。利用狱。
tuanshu: 颐中有物，曰噬嗑，噬嗑而亨。刚柔分，动而明，雷电合而章。柔得中而上行，虽不当位，利用狱也。
image:
雷电噬嗑；先王以明罚敕法。
屦校灭趾，不行也。
噬肤灭鼻，乘刚也。
遇毒，位不当也。
利艰贞吉，未光也。
贞厉无咎，得当也。
何校灭耳，聪不明也。
interpretation: 咬合硬物之象，象征排除障碍、严明法度。问事需要果断铲除阻碍（人事或制度），拖延反而生变。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，利于狱讼。
vernacular_image: 雷电噬嗑，先王以明罚敕法。
judgment_en: Biting Through. Success. It is beneficial to see the great person and to take action.
image_en:
Thunder above, fire below—this is Biting Through;
The nobleman observes the divisions and corrects the people.

The feet in the stocks—innocent—good fortune.

Biting through the nose—remorse disappears.

Biting through old meat—encountering poison—average.

Biting dried meat and getting arrows—caution brings good fortune, no blame.

The tiger looking—this brings good fortune. The leopard spotting—this isauspicious.

The person at the top—biting through—the nose is lost.
tuanshu_en:
Biting Through: thunder and fire are bright—the multi-colored.
The gentleman sees division and corrects the divisions among the people.
Biting through and connecting—correct and auspicious.
The hardness in the center—success.
vernacular_judgment_en: Biting Through. Success. It benefits to be correct and to see.
vernacular_image_en: Thunder above fire; the nobleman observes divisions among people and corrects them.
interpretation_en: A sign of biting through obstacles and overcoming difficulties. This is the time to take decisive action and resolve issues firmly. Success comes through proper judgment and action.

name: 贲
judgment: 贲：亨。小利有攸往。
tuanshu: 贲，亨；柔来而文刚，故亨。分刚上而文柔，故小利有攸往。刚柔交错，天文也；文明以止，人文也。观乎天文，以察时变；观乎人文，以化成天下。
image:
山下有火，贲；君子以明庶政，无敢折狱。
舍车而徒，义弗乘也。
贲其须，与上兴也。
永贞之吉，终莫之陵也。
六四，当位疑也。匪寇婚媾，终无尤也。
六五之吉，有喜也。
白贲无咎，上得志也。
interpretation: 文饰之美但本质刚柔交错之象。问事重在得体、礼仪周全，过度装饰反而失真；实质永远比表面重要。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，小利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 山下有火，贲，君子以明庶政。
judgment_en: Grace. Success. It is beneficial to make a correction in small matters.
image_en:
Mountain above, fire below—this is Grace;
The nobleman organizes and arranges, not for the sake of appearance.

Graceful beginning—good fortune.

Graceful and plain—correct—the gentleman is established.

Graceful, like a single hair—the form is not enough to follow.

Graceful extension—auspicious.

Graceful and white—the gentleman carries a sacrificial knife—the meaning is not his.

Graceful top—no one uses—in the end, movement brings misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
Grace: fire is below the mountain—bright yet stopping.
The gentleman, with proper order, arranges things—not for the sake of appearance.
The graceful white—taking the time to act.
Graceful and simple—the gentleman is established and does not forget danger.
vernacular_judgment_en: Grace. Success. It benefits to be correct and not to dwell on appearances.
vernacular_image_en: Mountain above fire; the nobleman organizes and arranges, not for vanity.
interpretation_en: A sign of grace and adornment—external beauty combined with inner substance. One should pursue both form and substance, with emphasis on inner virtue over external display.

name: 剥
judgment: 剥：不利。有攸往。
tuanshu: 剥，剥也，柔变刚也。不利有攸往，小人长也。顺而止之，观象也。君子尚消息盈虚，天行也。
image:
山附地上，剥；上以厚下，安宅。
剥床以足，以灭下也。
剥床以辨，未有与也。
剥之无咎，失上下也。
剥床以肤，切近灾也。
以宫人宠，终无尤也。
君子得舆，民所载也。小人剥庐，终不可用也。
interpretation: 阴气盛极、阳气剥落之象，提示当前处于下行期。宜顺时而止、保存根本，不做无谓抵抗；等待一阳来复。
vernacular_judgment: 剥，不利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 山附于地，剥，上以厚下安宅。
judgment_en: Splitting Apart. Not beneficial to go far. The inferior man advances and the superior man retreats.
image_en:
Mountain above, earth below—this is Splitting Apart;
The nobleman dwells below and does not seek to be above.

The splitting's leg—like losing one's servants—beginning, no help.

The splitting of the bed—losing the wife—misfortune.

The splitting no has no wound—enduring—auspicious.

The splitting bed turns to flesh—the body is all wounds—no blame.

The splitting top—no one begins—good fortune ends in misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
Splitting Apart: the mountain is on the earth—high and pressing down.
The nobleman dwells in the low place and does not seek to be above.
The splitting does not speak—the words are not heard.
Those who are split off are not the people—how can they accomplish anything?
vernacular_judgment_en: Splitting Apart. Do not act; it benefits to be firm and not to seek.
vernacular_image_en: Mountain above earth; the nobleman dwells in a humble place and does not seek high position.
interpretation_en: A sign of deterioration and collapse—this is a time when conditions worsen. One should retreat and conserve strength rather than resist the decline. The key is to wait out the difficult period.

name: 复
judgment: 复：亨。出入无疾，朋来无咎。反复其道，七日来复，利有攸往。
tuanshu: 复亨；刚反，动而以顺行，是以出入无疾，朋来无咎。反复其道，七日来复，天行也。利有攸往，刚长也。复其见天地之心乎？
image:
雷在地中，复；先王以至日闭关，商旅不行，后不省方。
不远之复，以修身也。
休复之吉，以下仁也。
频复之厉，义无咎也。
中行独复，以从道也。
敦复无悔，中以自考也。
迷复之凶，反君道也。
interpretation: 一阳来复之象，万物复苏的转折点。问事虽未大吉但已见生机——把握最初的势头、由小而大，终能复元。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，出入无疾，朋来无咎，反复其道，七日来复。
vernacular_image: 雷在地中，复，先王以至日闭关。
judgment_en: Return. Success. Going out and coming back has no blame.
image_en:
Earth above, thunder below—this is Return;
The nobleman uses punishment for instruction but does not put people in prison.

The return at the beginning—going out returns—auspicious.

The return is peaceful—good fortune.

The return is repeated—correct—the gentleman returns, no blame.

The return is solitary—going out returns—correct.

The return is full—there is praise.

The return is missed—there is no home—no help from others.
tuanshu_en:
Return: the yang returns and rises—this is the return of correctness.
The movements of thunder within the earth—the yang is concealed, then returns.
The return is correct andauspicious—the way of heaven returns.
Going out and returning—the circulation of the ten thousand things.
vernacular_judgment_en: Return. Success. Going out returns—auspicious. It benefits to see great people.
vernacular_image_en: Earth above thunder; yang returns and rises. The nobleman instructs through correction but does not imprison.
interpretation_en: A sign of return and renewal—the time for new beginnings. This represents a turning point where things return to the correct path. One should embrace the opportunity for fresh starts.

name: 无妄
judgment: 无妄：元亨。利贞。其匪正有眚，不利有攸往。
tuanshu: 无妄，刚自外来，而为主于内。动而健，刚中而应，大亨以正，天之命也。其匪正有眚，不利有攸往。无妄之往，何之矣？ 天命不佑，行矣哉？
image:
天下雷行，物与无妄；先王以茂对时，育万物。
无妄之往，得志也。
不耕获，未富也。
行人得牛，邑人灾也。
可贞无咎，固有之也。
无妄之药，不可试也。
无妄之行，穷之灾也。
interpretation: 不妄动、不欺人之象。问事大吉但前提是真心实意、动机纯正。任何虚伪侥幸的企图都将自食其果。
vernacular_judgment: 无妄，元亨，利贞，其匪正有眚，不利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 天下雷行，物与无妄，先王以茂对时育万物。
judgment_en: Innocence. Supreme success. The dragon lies hidden in the depths; do not act.
image_en:
Heaven above, thunder below—this is Innocence;
The nobleman uses straightforwardness to correct and influence people.

The innocent first—auspicious.

The innocent second—no-blame—correct—good fortune.

The innocent third—un-deserving—misfortune—the cow is the neighbor's loss.

The innocent fourth—can be held—guilty—but no blame.

The innocent fifth—not-deserving—illness—but without blame.

The innocent top—not-acting—even—misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
Innocence: the strong is above and the yielding is below—the strong achieves.
The movements are in accord with the timing—the yang is in the center.
Innocence brings good fortune—what is not in accord with correctness should not be acted upon.
vernacular_judgment_en: Innocence. Supreme success. It benefits to be correct; it is not beneficial to act.
vernacular_image_en: Heaven above thunder; the nobleman uses straightforwardness to correct and influence people.
interpretation_en: A sign of innocence and natural correctness—being in accord with the natural order. One should act naturally and correctly, without artifice or ulterior motives. This brings success when one is sincere.

name: 大畜
judgment: 大畜：利贞，不家食吉，利涉大川。
tuanshu: 大畜，刚健笃实辉光，日新其德，刚上而尚贤。能止健，大正也。不家食吉，养贤也。利涉大川，应乎天也。
image:
天在山中，大畜；君子以多识前言往行，以畜其德。
有厉利已，不犯灾也。
舆说輹，中无尤也。
利有攸往，上合志也。
六四元吉，有喜也。
六五之吉，有庆也。
何天之衢，道大行也。
interpretation: 大积蓄之象，学识、财富、人脉都在蓄积。问事宜守不宜动——等积累到临界点自然水到渠成，强行外放反而消耗。
vernacular_judgment: 利贞，不家食吉，利涉大川。
vernacular_image: 天在山中，大畜，君子以多识前言往行，以畜其德。
judgment_en: Great Taming. Success. Perseverance brings good fortune. It is beneficial to cross the great river.
image_en:
Mountain above, heaven below—this is Great Taming;
The nobleman stores knowledge and broadens virtue, guards with stillness and nourishes.

The tiger appearing—the great one sees.

The tiger looking—alert.

The young man is in danger—no blame.

"Fine leather"—the gentleman uses it to complete the task.

The slaughter—this isauspicious.

The taming is heaven—nothing not beneficial.
tuanshu_en:
Great Taming: the great accumulates and restrains—this is the taming of heaven.
The strong is in the center—this is great success and good fortune.
It benefits to be correct and to cross the great stream.
vernacular_judgment_en: Great Taming. Success. It benefits to be correct; it benefits to cross the great stream.
vernacular_image_en: Mountain above heaven; the nobleman stores knowledge and broadens virtue, guarding with stillness and nourishing.
interpretation_en: A sign of great restraint and accumulation—building strength for future action. This is a time for gathering resources and preparing for major accomplishments. Patience and careful planning are essential.

name: 颐
judgment: 颐：贞吉。观颐，自求口实。
tuanshu: 颐贞吉，养正则吉也。观颐，观其所养也；自求口实，观其自养也。天地养万物，圣人养贤，以及万民；颐之时义大矣哉！
image:
山下有雷，颐；君子以慎言语，节饮食。
观我朵颐，亦不足贵也。
六二征凶，行失类也。
十年勿用，道大悖也。
颠颐之吉，上施光也。
居贞之吉，顺以从上也。
由颐厉吉，大有庆也。
interpretation: 口舌养生之象，提示问事核心在于'养'——养身体、养德行、养资源。问健康、饮食、学习皆有所指。
vernacular_judgment: 贞吉，观颐，自求口实。
vernacular_image: 山下有雷，颐，君子以慎言语，节饮食。
judgment_en: Nourishment. Correctness brings success. Consider what you would use to nourish yourself.
image_en:
Thunder above, mountain below—this is Corners of the Mouth;
The nobleman values food and maintains proper behavior.

The cornucopia's first—swan on the bank—ten years, no marriage.

The cornucopia's second—contrary—auspicious—yellow gold.

The cornucopia's third—contrary to the ear—remorse, no blame.

The cornucopia's fourth—fine pieces—the gentleman breaks the cart, the man breaks the bed—remorse disappears.

The cornucopia's five—the walnut tree—the gentleman obtains the guests—the king presents the eastern field.

The cornucopia's top—mountain mouth—sighs—misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
Corners of the Mouth: the yielding is in the center and responds to the strong above.
The mouth and food are the people's heaven.
The tiger's looking—great seeing, great brightness.
The crane's cry—my companions awaken me—the son understands.
vernacular_judgment_en: Corners of the Mouth. It benefits to sacrifice; it benefits to have somewhere to go.
vernacular_image_en: Thunder above mountain; the nobleman values food and maintains proper behavior.
interpretation_en: A sign of nourishing and being nourished—the fundamental support for life. One should pay attention to basic needs and proper conduct. The key is to maintain balance in giving and receiving nourishment.

name: 大过
judgment: 大过：栋桡，利有攸往，亨。
tuanshu: 大过，大者过也。栋桡，本末弱也。刚过而中，巽而说行，利有攸往，乃亨。大过之时义大矣哉！
image:
泽灭木，大过。君子以独立不惧，遯世无闷。
藉用白茅，柔在下也。
老夫女妻，过以相与也。
栋桡之凶，不可以有辅也。
栋隆之吉，不桡乎下也。
枯杨生华，何可久也。老妇士夫，亦可丑也。
过涉之凶，不可咎也。
interpretation: 阳刚过盛、阴柔极弱之象，提示当前非常规状态。问事多有压力（房梁弯曲之象），需有得力者支撑、力挽狂澜。
vernacular_judgment: 栋桡，利有攸往，亨通。
vernacular_image: 泽灭木，大过，君子以独立不惧，遁世无闷。
judgment_en: Great Exceeding. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go. The ancient kings constructed a temple.
image_en:
Wind above, lake below—this is Great Excess;
The nobleman adds to what is not enough and removes from what is excessive.

The great beam rises—auspicious.

The old oak is replaced—the gentleman uses the sedan chair—correct.

The young oak—grief—young man's misfortune.

"Excess" is not a mat—the top is changed.

The withered mulberry—returns—auspicious.

The excess crosses the stream—the raft is broken—no blame.
tuanshu_en:
Great Excess: the wind is above the lake—moving upward.
The great passes through—this is great success.
The excess in the center—this is the way of heaven.
The great wood on the weak earth—something great is about to happen.
vernacular_judgment_en: Great Excess. Success. It benefits to cross the great stream; the great beam rises.
vernacular_image_en: Wind above the lake; the nobleman adds to what is insufficient and removes from what is excessive.
interpretation_en: A sign of great excess or overload—this is when conditions reach an extreme. One should be cautious and seek balance. This can indicate either great opportunity or great danger, depending on how one handles it.

name: 坎
judgment: 习坎：有孚，维心亨。行有尚。
tuanshu: 习坎，重险也。水流而不盈，行险而不失其信。维心亨，乃以刚中也。行有尚，往有功也。天险不可升也，地险山川丘陵也，王公设险以守其国，坎之时用大矣哉！
image:
水洊至，习坎；君子以常德行，习教事。
习坎入坎，失道凶也。
求小得，未出中也。
来之坎坎，终无功也。
樽酒簋贰，刚柔济也。
坎不盈，中未大也。
interpretation: 重重险难之象，提示当前处境险恶。但卦辞强调'有孚'——以诚信守正为核心，反而能在险中得助、转危为机。
vernacular_judgment: 习坎，有孚维心，亨通，行有尚。
vernacular_image: 水洊至习坎，君子以常德行，习教事。
judgment_en: The Abysmal. Success. The king has trapped his triple cave. It is beneficial to cross the great river.
image_en:
Water above, water below—this is The Abyss;
The nobleman uses careful thought to transform and cultivate the self.

The abyss at the entrance—entering the abyss's gate—auspicious.

The abyss in the second—three people travel together—maintaining one loses.

The entering the abyss—entering the center—no blame.

"Abyss" is entering for wine and food—preparing the offerings.

The abyss at the pit—no one goes—remorse.

Going into the abyss—the rope is deep—the danger is high—retreat.
tuanshu_en:
The Abyss: water overlaps water—the danger within danger.
The gentleman uses careful thought to cultivate virtue.
Abyss upon abyss—the peril accumulates.
One who is correct will find their way through.
vernacular_judgment_en: The Abyss. Success. It benefits to be correct; it benefits to cross the great stream.
vernacular_image_en: Water above water; the nobleman uses careful thought to transform and cultivate the self.
interpretation_en: A sign of danger and the abyss—one must be extremely careful. This is not the time for bold action; instead, one should cultivate inner strength and wait for the right moment. Careful planning ensures survival.

name: 离
judgment: 离：利贞。亨。畜牝牛，吉。
tuanshu: 离，丽也；日月丽乎天，百谷草木丽乎土，重明以丽乎正，乃化成天下。柔丽乎中正，故亨；是以畜牝牛吉也。
image:
明两作离，大人以继明照于四方。
履错之敬，以辟咎也。
黄离元吉，得中道也。
日昃之离，何可久也。
突如其来如，无所容也。
六五之吉，离王公也。
王用出征，以正邦也。
interpretation: 光明依附之象，火焰须附着才能燃烧。问事大吉但核心是'附着'——依附明主、明道、正确的事业才能发光。
vernacular_judgment: 利贞，亨通，畜牝牛吉。
vernacular_image: 明两作，离，大人以继明照于四方。
judgment_en: The Clinging. Success. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go. The mother obtains jade and then returns.
image_en:
Fire above, fire below—this is The Clinging;
The nobleman arranges the conduct and examines the faults.

The lying down, flying—auspicious.

The yellow light—great auspiciousness.

The coming of the departing—the light is not fixed—remorse.

"Departing" goes quickly—fire is bright.

The departing comes with tears—grief—regret.

The fire's top—the beginning is opposition—the fire is stopped—misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
The Clinging: fire clings to fire—this is brightness.
The bright one arises and shines—the world is illuminated.
The correct center—this is great success.
Clinging to what is correct—this is the way of heaven.
vernacular_judgment_en: The Clinging. Success. The light advances; it benefits to be correct and see the great person.
vernacular_image_en: Fire above fire; the nobleman arranges proper conduct and examines faults.
interpretation_en: A sign of brightness and clinging to what is luminous—this represents clarity and understanding. One should seek knowledge and maintain proper conduct. The bright and clear path leads to success.

name: 咸
judgment: 咸：亨。利贞。取女吉。
tuanshu: 咸，感也。柔上而刚下，二气感应以相与，止而说，男下女，是以亨利贞，取女吉也。天地感而万物化生，圣人感人心而天下和平；观其所感，而天地万物之情可见矣！
image:
山上有泽，咸；君子以虚受人。
咸其拇，志在外也。
虽凶，居吉，顺不害也。
咸其股，亦不处也。志在随人，所执下也。
贞吉悔亡，未感害也。憧憧往来，未光大也。
咸其脢，志末也。
咸其辅，颊，舌，滕口说也。
interpretation: 山泽通气、男女相感之象。问感情、合作、人际大吉——心有灵犀一点通，自然而然的水到渠成。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，利贞，取女吉。
vernacular_image: 山上有泽，咸，君子以虚受人。
judgment_en: Influence. Success. Perseverance brings good fortune. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go.
image_en:
Lake above, mountain below—this is Influence;
The nobleman receives guests and makes them stay long.

Influence's beginning—auspicious, correct—the gentleman will marry.

The influence's calf—good fortune, no blame.

The influence's fourth—auspicious, no blame—the heart is moved, no blame.

The influence's fifth—firm and correct—the bull is guaranteed—not for me, but for someone else.

The influence's top—auspicious, no blame—the jaw is restrained.
tuanshu_en:
Influence: the yielding is in the center and responds to the strong above.
The mountain is below the lake—one influences the other.
Influence, correct and auspicious—receiving guests makes them stay.
Firm influence is auspicious—correct and not deviating.
vernacular_judgment_en: Influence. Success. It benefits to be correct; it benefits to have somewhere to go.
vernacular_image_en: Lake above mountain; the nobleman receives guests and makes them stay.
interpretation_en: A sign of mutual influence and attraction—this represents the interaction between opposites. This is a time for building relationships and connections that bring mutual benefit.

name: 恒
judgment: 恒：亨，无咎。利贞，利有攸往。
tuanshu: 恒，久也。刚上而柔下，雷风相与，巽而动，刚柔皆应，恒。恒亨无咎，利贞；久于其道也，天地之道，恒久而不已也。利有攸往，终则有始也。日月得天，而能久照，四时变化，而能久成，圣人久于其道，而天下化成；观其所恒，而天地万物之情可见矣！
image:
雷风，恒；君子以立不易方。
浚恒之凶，始求深也。
九二悔亡，能久中也。
不恒其德，无所容也。
久非其位，安得禽也。
妇人贞吉，从一而终也。夫子制义，从妇凶也。
振恒在上，大无功也。
interpretation: 雷风相与之象，提示坚守正道、持之以恒。问事需有耐心——变化中保持恒心，不因短期挫折而动摇。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，无咎，利贞，利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 雷风恒，君子以立不易方。
judgment_en: Duration. Success. No blame. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go.
image_en:
Wind above, thunder below—this is Duration;
The nobleman stands firm and does not change the proper order.

Duration's first—auspicious, correct—the woman is firm.

Duration's second—no help from others—remorse.

The gentleman uses the horse—the woman uses the sedan chair—misfortune.

Duration is not having a fixed place—the gentleman goes out.

The field's beast—correct—good fortune.
tuanshu_en:
Duration: wind and thunder unite—this is duration.
The lasting one is correct—the gentleman does not change.
The strong is in the center and correct—duration brings good fortune.
What endures is the correct and constant.
vernacular_judgment_en: Duration. Success. It benefits to be correct; it benefits to have somewhere to go.
vernacular_image_en: Wind above thunder; the nobleman stands firm and does not change the proper order.
interpretation_en: A sign of duration and constancy—maintaining proper course over time. One should be steadfast in principle while remaining flexible in approach. Success comes from consistent effort.

name: 遁
judgment: 遁：亨。小利贞。
tuanshu: 遁亨，遁而亨也。刚当位而应，与时行也。小利贞，浸而长也。遁之时义大矣哉！
image:
天下有山，遁；君子以远小人，不恶而严。
遁尾之厉，不往何灾也。
执用黄牛，固志也。
系遁之厉，有疾惫也。畜臣妾吉，不可大事也。
君子好遁，小人否也。
嘉遁贞吉，以正志也。
肥遁，无不利；无所疑也。
interpretation: 阴长阳消、君子退避之象。当前大环境对小人不利，宜明哲保身、远离是非。退不是怯，是智慧。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，小利贞。
vernacular_image: 天下有山，遁，君子以远小人，不恶而严。
judgment_en: Retreat. Success. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go.
image_en:
Mountain above, heaven below—this is Retreat;
The nobleman keeps distant from those below and does not mix with them.

Retreat's beginning—correct—the gentleman retires and remains correct.

The retreating man holds the rein—slowly the horse can be stopped.

The retreating man's attendant—no blame—the gentleman is correct.

The retreat is firm—the gentleman's campaign—good fortune, no blame.

The retreat is auspicious—auspicious—the gentleman retires and remains correct.

The retreat is high—nothing not beneficial.
tuanshu_en:
Retreat: the strong withdraws from above—this is the mountain under heaven.
The nobleman keeps distant from those below and does not mix with them.
Retreat, correct and auspicious—the gentleman retires and remains correct.
What is retreated from is not the way of heaven—what is retreated from is the people's trouble.
vernacular_judgment_en: Retreat. Success. It benefits to be correct and to have somewhere to go.
vernacular_image_en: Mountain above heaven; the nobleman keeps distant from those below and does not associate with them.
interpretation_en: A sign of strategic retreat—when one must withdraw from a difficult situation. This is not defeat but wise positioning. The key is knowing when to advance and when to retreat.

name: 大壮
judgment: 大壮：利贞。
tuanshu: 大壮，大者壮也。刚以动，故壮。大壮利贞；大者正也。正大而天地之情可见矣！
image:
雷在天上，大壮；君子以非礼弗履。
壮于趾，其孚穷也。
九二贞吉，以中也。
小人用壮，君子罔也。
藩决不羸，尚往也。
丧羊于易，位不当也。
不能退，不能遂，不详也。艰则吉，咎不长也。
interpretation: 阳气壮盛之象，但警示不可恃强凌弱。问事大吉但要守正道——力量越大越要自律，蛮横者终将自折。
vernacular_judgment: 大壮，利贞。
vernacular_image: 雷在天上，大壮，君子以非礼弗履。
judgment_en: Great Power. Success. Perseverance brings good fortune.
image_en:
Thunder above, heaven below—this is Great Power;
The nobleman does not act contrary to what is not correct.

Great power at the beginning—auspicious, no blame.

The great power is dangerous—the father and mother are not complete.

The small uses the ox—large uses the person—no blame.

The great power is in the right arm—cannot bind—correct—good fortune.

The great power is in the teeth—good fortune, no blame.

The great power is in the dragon's neck—misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
Great Power: thunder rises from below—great movement and sway.
The great one acts and the world follows.
The strong achieves—this is the way of heaven.
Those who are not correct—how can they have power?
vernacular_judgment_en: Great Power. It benefits to be correct. The ram pushes the fence—nothing not beneficial.
vernacular_image_en: Thunder above heaven; the nobleman does not act contrary to what is correct.
interpretation_en: A sign of great power and strength—when one's power reaches its peak. This is a time to act with great force, but one must ensure that actions are righteous. Power used wrongly brings misfortune.

name: 晋
judgment: 晋：康侯用锡马蕃庶，昼日三接。
tuanshu: 晋，进也。明出地上，顺而丽乎大明，柔进而上行。是以康侯用锡马蕃庶，昼日三接也。
image:
明出地上，晋；君子以自昭明德。
晋如，摧如；独行正也。裕无咎；未受命也。
受兹介福，以中正也。
众允之志，上行也。
鼫鼠贞厉，位不当也。
失得勿恤，往有庆也。
维用伐邑，道未光也。
interpretation: 日出地上、光明上进之象。问事业、地位、学业皆吉，前途光明。但要记住太阳尚有午时之盛——不可懈怠。
vernacular_judgment: 康侯用锡马蕃庶，昼日三接。
vernacular_image: 明出地上，晋，君子以自昭明德。
judgment_en: Progress. Great success and progress. It is beneficial to see the great person.
image_en:
Fire above, earth below—this is Progress;
The nobleman illuminates all within the four seas.

The progress's first—the family grows—remorse disappears.

The progress's second—progress isauspicious—the woman is firm.

The progress's third—the lord's progress—trust is lost.

The progress's fourth—advancing like a hamster—the gentleman is cautious.

The progress's fifth—faith is not forgotten—auspicious.

The progress's top—the progress is advanced—progress and retreat—confusion.
tuanshu_en:
Progress: fire rises from the earth—the brightness spreads.
The nobleman illuminates all within the four seas.
Progress, correct and auspicious—receiving from above.
Progress with brightness—advancing is the way.
vernacular_judgment_en: Progress. Success. It benefits to see great people; it benefits to receive the great blessing.
vernacular_image_en: Fire above earth; the nobleman illuminates all within the four seas.
interpretation_en: A sign of progress and advancement—this is a time of forward movement and success. One should take advantage of favorable conditions and make progress in one's endeavors.

name: 明夷
judgment: 明夷：利艰贞。
tuanshu: 明入地中，明夷。内文明而外柔顺，以蒙大难，文王以之。利艰贞，晦其明也，内难而能正其志，箕子以之。
image:
明入地中，明夷；君子以莅众，用晦而明。
君子于行，义不食也。
六二之吉，顺以则也。
南狩之志，乃大得也。
入于左腹，获心意也。
箕子之贞，明不可息也。
初登于天，照四国也。后入于地，失则也。
interpretation: 光明被遮之象，提示当前宜韬光养晦。问事不吉——大环境不容明者张扬，君子须内藏智慧、外示愚拙，方可保身。
vernacular_judgment: 利艰贞。
vernacular_image: 明入地中，明夷，君子以莅众，用晦而明。
judgment_en: Darkening of the Light. Perseverance brings good fortune. Enter the darkness but do not serve.
image_en:
Earth above, fire below—this is Darkening of the Light;
The nobleman restricts himself and does not act on all he sees.

The darkening's first—darkening is descending—the traveling goes.

The darkening's second—darkening of the light—to the left is hurt.

The darkening's third—darkening of the light—hunting the southern field—gains the great leader.

The fourth—entering the left—is darkening.

The fifth—using the silk—sighing—is auspicious.

The beginning of darkness—the brightness is not used—the goat crashes into the fence.
tuanshu_en:
Darkening of the Light: the bright is hidden below the earth—the darkness covers.
The nobleman restricts himself and does not act on all he sees.
The bright is in the center—the darkness cannot overcome.
Those who are not correct—how can they remain?
vernacular_judgment_en: Darkening of the Light. It benefits to be correct and to endure difficulties.
vernacular_image_en: Earth above fire; the nobleman restricts himself and does not act on everything he sees.
interpretation_en: A sign of darkened times—when one's light is obscured. This is a time to be cautious and preserve one's strength. The key is to wait patiently while maintaining inner virtue until the darkness passes.

name: 家人
judgment: 家人：利女贞。
tuanshu: 家人，女正位乎内，男正位乎外，男女正，天地之大义也。家人有严君焉，父母之谓也。父父，子子，兄兄，弟弟，夫夫，妇妇，而家道正；正家而天下定矣。
image:
风自火出，家人；君子以言有物，而行有恒。
闲有家，志未变也。
六二之吉，顺以巽也。
家人嗃嗃，未失也；妇子嘻嘻，失家节也。
富家大吉，顺在位也。
王假有家，交相爱也。
威如之吉，反身之谓也。
interpretation: 风火相依、家道正之象。问家庭、感情、合伙大吉，关键在'正位'——各司其职、长幼有序，家道自然昌盛。
vernacular_judgment: 利女贞。
vernacular_image: 风自火出，家人，君子以言有物而行有恒。
judgment_en: The Family. Women and children first, then success.
image_en:
Wind above, fire below—this is The Family;
The nobleman speaks seriously and acts with propriety.

The family begins with the woman—auspicious.

The family—do not wash—the gentleman does not take the osprey.

The family in the oven—"my wife and children laugh and talk"—the woman and children cannot be laughed at.

The family is the great stronghold—guard—correct—good fortune.

The family's royal house—encloses the osprey—auspicious.

The family's top—reverent work—auspicious.
tuanshu_en:
The Family: the wind enters the fire—the fire flares up and brightens.
The father is father, the son is son—the proper order is established.
The woman is modest and obedient—the family is regulated.
Speaking seriously and acting with propriety—this is the way to govern the family.
vernacular_judgment_en: The Family. Success. The woman is modest and obedient; the man is correct and proper.
vernacular_image_en: Wind above fire; the nobleman speaks seriously and acts with propriety.
interpretation_en: A sign of the family and domestic harmony—establishing proper order in the home. This is the foundation for all success. Proper relationships and conduct within the family lead to broader success in life.

name: 睽
judgment: 睽：小事吉。
tuanshu: 睽，火动而上，泽动而下；二女同居，其志不同行；说而丽乎明，柔进而上行，得中而应乎刚；是以小事吉。天地睽，而其事同也；男女睽，而其志通也；万物睽，而其事类也；睽之时用大矣哉！
image:
上火下泽，睽；君子以同而异。
见恶人，以辟咎也。
遇主于巷，未失道也。
见舆曳，位不当也。无初有终，遇刚也。
交孚无咎，志行也。
厥宗噬肤，往有庆也。
遇雨之吉，群疑亡也。
interpretation: 水火相违、背道而驰之象。当前多方意见相左、难求一致。问事多分歧，宜求同存异——小处可通，大事不必强求。
vernacular_judgment: 小事吉。
vernacular_image: 上火下泽，睽，君子以同而异。
judgment_en: Opposition. Success. In small matters, good fortune.
image_en:
Fire above, lake below—this is Opposition;
The nobleman maintains clarity in isolation.

Opposition's beginning—auspicious, correct—the gentleman maintains separation.

The opposition is cut—the gentleman maintains separation—the heart is not connected.

The opposition's third—carrying the corpse—as if laughing—misfortune.

The opposition's fourth—opposition is not connected—firm—good fortune, no blame.

The opposition's fifth—great person transforms—the silk is changed—auspicious.

The opposition's top—opposition's turning—misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
Opposition: fire rises above the lake—the brightness is distant.
The nobleman maintains clarity in isolation—the small are not united.
Opposition in the center—separated from above.
Those who are not correct—how can they connect?
vernacular_judgment_en: Opposition. Auspicious. The gentleman maintains separation.
vernacular_image_en: Fire above lake; the nobleman maintains clarity in isolation.
interpretation_en: A sign of opposition and disagreement—this is a time when cooperation is difficult. One should maintain personal integrity and wait for better circumstances rather than forcing alignment.

name: 蹇
judgment: 蹇：利西南，不利东北；利见大人，贞吉。
tuanshu: 蹇，难也，险在前也。见险而能止，知矣哉！蹇利西南，往得中也；不利东北，其道穷也。利见大人，往有功也。当位贞吉，以正邦也。蹇之时用大矣哉！
image:
山上有水，蹇；君子以反身修德。
往蹇来誉，宜待也。
王臣蹇蹇，终无尤也。
往蹇来反，内喜之也。
往蹇来连，当位实也。
大蹇朋来，以中节也。
往蹇来硕，志在内也。利见大人，以从贵也。
interpretation: 外险内难、行路蹇涩之象。当前困难重重，不宜冒进。问事多阻，宜反身修德、内求诸己，等待时机。
vernacular_judgment: 利西南，不利东北，利见大人，贞吉。
vernacular_image: 山上有水，蹇，君子以反身修德。
judgment_en: Obstruction. The superior man should turn back. It is beneficial to see the great person.
image_en:
Water above, mountain below—this is Obstruction;
The nobleman reflects on the obstruction and restrains the self.

Obstruction's first—going comes to obstruction—retreat—auspicious.

The obstruction's second—king's minister is besieged—do not act—correct.

The obstruction's third—going stops at obstruction—remorse.

The obstruction's fourth—going arrives at the obstructer—firm—auspicious, no blame.

The obstruction's fifth—great people are obstructed—their obstruction ends.

The obstruction's top—the obstructer's reversal—first obstruction then progress.
tuanshu_en:
Obstruction: water is above the mountain—the water flows and is obstructed.
The nobleman reflects on the obstruction and restrains the self.
Obstruction brings reflection—the gentleman turns to virtue.
The obstruction is in the center—correct and auspicious.
Those who advance meet obstruction; those who retreat find safety.
vernacular_judgment_en: Obstruction. It benefits to see great people; it benefits to cross the great stream.
vernacular_image_en: Water above mountain; the nobleman reflects on obstruction and restrains himself.
interpretation_en: A sign of obstruction and difficulty—times when progress is blocked. One should pause and reflect rather than push forward. This is a time for careful planning and waiting for the obstruction to clear.

name: 解
judgment: 解：利西南，无所往，其来复吉。有攸往，夙吉。
tuanshu: 解，险以动，动而免乎险，解。解利西南，往得众也。其来复吉，乃得中也。有攸往夙吉，往有功也。天地解，而雷雨作，雷雨作，而百果草木皆甲坼，解之时义大矣哉！
image:
雷雨作，解；君子以赦过宥罪。
刚柔之际，义无咎也。
九二贞吉，得中道也。
负且乘，亦可丑也，自我致戎，又谁咎也。
解而拇，未当位也。
君子有解，小人退也。
公用射隼，以解悖也。
interpretation: 雷雨大作、万物舒解之象。提示问事已有缓解之机，该放下的放下、该和解的和解。把握住松动期，行动可成。
vernacular_judgment: 利西南，无所往，其来复吉，有攸往夙吉。
vernacular_image: 雷雨作，解，君子以赦过宥罪。
judgment_en: Deliverance. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go. Small fortune.
image_en:
Thunder above, water below—this is Deliverance;
The nobleman forgives mistakes and remits offenses.

Deliverance's first—no blame—the gentleman goes out and returns.

Deliverance's second—catches three foxes—gets the yellow arrow—no blame.

The gentleman uses the carriage—carrying things—correct—good fortune.

Deliverance is in the top—the prince shoots—catches the hawk and loses it.

The deliverer's first—going brings rain—great auspiciousness—the gentleman is correct.

The deliverer's top—no blame.
tuanshu_en:
Deliverance: thunder moves and rain falls—all things are liberated.
The nobleman forgives mistakes and remits offenses.
Deliverance, correct and auspicious—removing the obstruction.
The strong is in the center—deliverance follows.
vernacular_judgment_en: Deliverance. Success. It benefits to be correct; the fox crosses the water—halfway there is danger but final success.
vernacular_image_en: Thunder above water; the nobleman forgives mistakes and remits offenses.
interpretation_en: A sign of deliverance and liberation—when obstacles are removed and freedom is restored. This is the time to take action and free oneself from difficulties. Correct conduct ensures success.

name: 损
judgment: 损：有孚，元吉。无咎，可贞，利有攸往。曷之用？二簋可用享。
tuanshu: 损，损下益上，其道上行。损而有孚，元吉，无咎，可贞，利有攸往。曷之用？二簋可用享；二簋应有时。损刚益柔有时，损益盈虚，与时偕行。
image:
山下有泽，损；君子以惩忿窒欲。
已事遄往，尚合志也。
九二利贞，中以为志也。
一人行，三则疑也。
损其疾，亦可喜也。
六五元吉，自上佑也。
弗损益之，大得志也。
interpretation: 损上益下之象，问事需先有付出、有所舍弃。问感情（让一步）、问健康（节制）、问财务（节流）皆有所指。
vernacular_judgment: 有孚，元吉，无咎，可贞，利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 山下有泽，损，君子以惩忿窒欲。
judgment_en: Decrease. Success. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go. Sincerity brings good fortune.
image_en:
Mountain above, water below—this is Decrease;
The nobleman restrains anger and controls desires.

Decrease's first—going quickly is not blamed—ten pairs cannot follow.

The decrease's second—correct—the gentleman decreases the above.

The decrease's third—three people go—one decreases—there is one to return.

The decrease's fourth—decreasing one's illness—the gentleman decreases his joy—is auspicious.

The decrease's fifth—"no one does not increase"—the king gives—auspicious.

The decrease's top—"increase without ceasing"—auspicious, no blame—the gentleman uses the increase.
tuanshu_en:
Decrease: water goes down from the mountain—the stream flows and decreases.
The nobleman restrains anger and controls desires.
Decrease with correctness—no blame—the gentleman decreases himself.
The decrease is in the center—the decrease is correct.
Decrease and increase—the way of heaven.
vernacular_judgment_en: Decrease. Success. It benefits to be correct; it benefits to have somewhere to go.
vernacular_image_en: Mountain above water; the nobleman restrains anger and controls desires.
interpretation_en: A sign of decrease and sacrifice—when one must give up something for the greater good. This can be a time of loss, but it also presents opportunities for spiritual growth and future gain.

name: 益
judgment: 益：利有攸往。利涉大川。
tuanshu: 益，损上益下，民说无疆，自上下下，其道大光。利有攸往，中正有庆。利涉大川，木道乃行。益动而巽，日进无疆。天施地生，其益无方。凡益之道，与时偕行。
image:
风雷，益；君子以见善则迁，有过则改。
元吉无咎，下不厚事也。
或益之，自外来也。
益用凶事，固有之也。
告公从，以益志也。
有孚惠心，勿问之矣。惠我德，大得志也。
莫益之，偏辞也。或击之，自外来也。
interpretation: 损上益下之象，与损相对。问事大吉——主动给予、施惠于下，反而能增益自身。但要把握时机，不可滥施。
vernacular_judgment: 利有攸往，利涉大川。
vernacular_image: 风雷益，君子以见善则迁，有过则改。
judgment_en: Increase. Supreme success. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go.
image_en:
Wind above, thunder below—this is Increase;
The nobleman sees good and imitates it, corrects errors and increases virtue.

Increase's first—great auspiciousness—this is beneficial.

The increase's second—making offerings—good fortune, no blame—getting the yellow copper.

The increase's third—believing brings misfortune—trust without doubt—no blame.

The increase's fourth—following brings good fortune—the gentleman arranges things.

The increase's fifth—genuine—middle—heaven's blessing.

The increase's top—"increase without ceasing"—auspicious—beneficial to cross the great stream.
tuanshu_en:
Increase: thunder moves below, wind assists above—this is increase.
The nobleman sees the good and imitates it, corrects errors and increases virtue.
Increase in the center—correct and auspicious.
The way of heaven increases the humble and diminishes the proud.
The way of earth increases the low and diminishes the high.
vernacular_judgment_en: Increase. Success. It benefits to cross the great stream; it benefits to see great people.
vernacular_image_en: Wind above thunder; the nobleman sees good and imitates it, correcting errors and increasing virtue.
interpretation_en: A sign of increase and growth—this is a time of expansion and gaining advantage. One should take advantage of favorable conditions to advance one's goals. Proper conduct brings continued success.

name: 夬
judgment: 夬：扬于王庭，孚号，有厉，告自邑，不利即戎，利有攸往。
tuanshu: 夬，决也，刚决柔也。健而说，决而和，扬于王庭，柔乘五刚也。孚号有厉，其危乃光也。告自邑，不利即戎，所尚乃穷也。利有攸往，刚长乃终也。
image:
泽上于天，夬；君子以施禄及下，居德则忌。
不胜而往，咎也。
莫夜有戎，得中道也。
君子夬夬，终无咎也。
其行次且，位不当也。闻言不信，聪不明也。
中行无咎，中未光也。
无号之凶，终不可长也。
interpretation: 泽上于天、决去阴柔之象。当前需要决断（决裂、决择、铲除）。问事多涉小人之阻，宜果决行动、不可迟疑。
vernacular_judgment: 扬于王庭，孚号有厉，告自邑，不利即戎，利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 泽上于天，夬，君子以施禄及下，居德则忌。
judgment_en: Breakthrough. There is a place to go but confidence is not yet complete.
image_en:
Lake above, heaven below—this is Breakthrough;
The nobleman announces the decision in the high place and carries out the attack.

Breakthrough at the beginning—auspicious, no blame—the gentleman advances.

The breakthrough's second—danger—good fortune—the woman is firm.

The breakthrough's third—"the face has no shame"—the gentleman advances.

The breakthrough's fourth—"the buttock has no flesh"—the ram pushes the fence.

The breakthrough's fifth—white grass—the gentleman obtains the guests—auspicious.

The breakthrough's top—"no one advances"—the cry is exhausted.
tuanshu_en:
Breakthrough: the lake is above the heavens—the waters rise and overflow.
The nobleman announces the decision in the high place and carries out the attack.
Breakthrough, correct and auspicious—what is not correct is removed.
The strong is in the center—breakthrough is achieved.
The way of heaven increases and removes what is not correct.
vernacular_judgment_en: Breakthrough. Auspicious. The gentleman announces the decision in the high place.
vernacular_image_en: Lake above heaven; the nobleman announces his decision in a high place and carries out the attack.
interpretation_en: A sign of breakthrough and decisive action—when conditions have reached the point where one must act with force. This is the time to push through obstacles and achieve victory.

name: 姤
judgment: 姤：女壮，勿用取女。
tuanshu: 姤，遇也，柔遇刚也。勿用取女，不可与长也。天地相遇，品物咸章也。刚遇中正，天下大行也。姤之时义大矣哉！
image:
天下有风，姤；后以施命诰四方。
系于金柅，柔道牵也。
包有鱼，义不及宾也。
其行次且，行未牵也。
无鱼之凶，远民也。
九五含章，中正也。有陨自天，志不舍命也。
姤其角，上穷吝也。
interpretation: 阴气初生于阳之象，提示一阴初起、不可不察。问事虽遇合但暗藏隐患——小人不显时就要防范，萌芽阶段处理最佳。
vernacular_judgment: 女壮，勿用取女。
vernacular_image: 天下有风，姤，后以施命诰四方。
judgment_en: Coming to Meet. The woman is powerful. Do not marry. Ride the ram and be restrained.
image_en:
Wind above, heaven below—this is Coming to Meet;
The nobleman explains the warnings and demonstrates the teaching.

Coming to meet at the beginning—"the wild goose approaches the lake"—auspicious, no blame.

The coming meets the firm—nothing not beneficial—the woman is firm.

The coming meets the middle—weapon—there is danger.

The coming meets at the fourth—good fortune, no blame—the gentleman arranges the horses.

The coming meets in the five—"the wild goose approaches the wood"—the gentleman obtains the guests.

The coming meets the top—"the wild goose approaches the stone"—the wife holds the spear.
tuanshu_en:
Coming to Meet: wind is above the heavens—the woman follows the man.
The nobleman explains the warnings and demonstrates the teaching.
Coming to meet, correct and auspicious—the woman is modest and obedient.
The strong meets the yielding—things are as they should be.
vernacular_judgment_en: Coming to Meet. The woman is firm; there is something to accomplish.
vernacular_image_en: Wind above heaven; the nobleman explains warnings and demonstrates teaching.
interpretation_en: A sign of coming to meet and encounter—this represents a meeting between opposites. This is a time for partnerships and associations that bring mutual benefit.

name: 萃
judgment: 萃：亨。王假有庙，利见大人，亨。利贞。用大牲吉，利有攸往。
tuanshu: 萃，聚也；顺以说，刚中而应，故聚也。王假有庙，致孝享也。利见大人亨，聚以正也。用大牲吉，利有攸往，顺天命也。观其所聚，而天地万物之情可见矣。
image:
泽上于地，萃；君子以除戎器，戒不虞。
乃乱乃萃，其志乱也。
引吉无咎，中未变也。
往无咎，上巽也。
大吉无咎，位不当也。
萃有位，志未光也。
赍咨涕洟，未安上也。
interpretation: 泽上于地、万物聚萃之象。问事大吉，人心归聚、众望所归。核心在'诚信'——不诚则散，诚则久聚。
vernacular_judgment: 王假有庙，利见大人，亨通，利贞，用大牲吉，利有攸往。
vernacular_image: 泽上于地，萃，君子以除戎器，戒不虞。
judgment_en: Gathering Together. Success. The king approaches the temple. It is beneficial to see the great person.
image_en:
Lake above, earth below—this is Gathering Together;
The nobleman establishes trust and builds fortifications.

The gathering's first—holding the rein—good fortune—reliability.

The gathering's second—bringing—the gentleman is correct, no blame.

The gathering's third—"gather" sits and sighs—misfortune—the gentleman advances.

The gathering's fourth—great person—the gentleman obtains the guests—auspicious, no blame.

The gathering's fifth—"gather" is in the hair—the gentleman obtains the guests.

The gathering's top—sighing and weeping—all speak, all weep.
tuanshu_en:
Gathering Together: the lake is above the earth—water gathers and flows.
The nobleman establishes trust and builds fortifications.
Gathering together, correct and auspicious—the gentleman gathers the people.
The gathering is in the center—people trust and gather.
The gathering of the multitude—depends on the correct leader.
vernacular_judgment_en: Gathering Together. Success. It benefits to see great people; the gathering does not end.
vernacular_image_en: Lake above earth; the nobleman establishes trust and builds up defense.
interpretation_en: A sign of gathering and assembly—this is a time for bringing people together. Unity and collective action are powerful. The key is to unite with the right purpose and right people.

name: 升
judgment: 升：元亨，用见大人，勿恤，南征吉。
tuanshu: 柔以时升，巽而顺，刚中而应，是以大亨。用见大人，勿恤；有庆也。南征吉，志行也。
image:
地中生木，升；君子以顺德，积小以高大。
允升大吉，上合志也。
九二之孚，有喜也。
升虚邑，无所疑也。
王用亨于岐山，顺事也。
贞吉升阶，大得志也。
冥升在上，消不富也。
interpretation: 地中生木、循序渐进之象。问事大吉，事业、学业、地位皆稳步上升。但要保持虚心——木从地下生出，根基不实则倾。
vernacular_judgment: 元亨，用见大人，勿恤，南征吉。
vernacular_image: 地中生木，升，君子以顺德，积小以高大。
judgment_en: Pushing Upward. Great success. It is beneficial to have somewhere to go.
image_en:
Earth above, wood below—this is Pushing Upward;
The nobleman accumulates small things to achieve great virtue.

Pushing upward at the beginning—auspicious—the gentleman pushes upward.

Pushing upward's second—"push upward" uses bamboo—the gentleman pushes upward—good fortune.

The pushing upward's third—the gentleman pushes upward—firm.

Pushing upward's fourth—"push upward" is like a rat—the gentleman is uncertain.

Pushing upward's fifth—"push upward" obtains the jade—the gentleman obtains the guests.

The pushing upward's top—"push upward" is dark—the beginning pushes upward, then stops.
tuanshu_en:
Pushing Upward: wood grows within the earth—the root penetrates and rises.
The nobleman accumulates small things to achieve great virtue.
Pushing upward, correct and auspicious—the gentleman pushes upward.
The pushing upward follows the center—the correct and auspicious.
Those who advance are not stopped—the way of heaven assists.
vernacular_judgment_en: Pushing Upward. Success. It benefits to see great people.
vernacular_image_en: Earth above wood; the nobleman accumulates small things to achieve great virtue.
interpretation_en: A sign of upward progress and advancement—steady rise to success. This is a time of growth and climbing higher. Patient effort leads to achievement of goals.

name: 困
judgment: 困：亨，贞大人吉，无咎，有言不信。
tuanshu: 困，刚掩也。险以说，困而不失其所，亨；其唯君子乎？ 贞大人吉，以刚中也。有言不信，尚口乃穷也。
image:
泽无水，困；君子以致命遂志。
入于幽谷，幽不明也。
困于酒食，中有庆也。
据于蒺藜，乘刚也。入于其宫，不见其妻，不祥也。
来徐徐，志在下也。虽不当位，有与也。
劓刖，志未得也。乃徐有说，以中直也。利用祭祀，受福也。
困于葛藟，未当也。动悔，有悔，吉行也。
interpretation: 泽无水、困于上之象。当前处困顿之境，问事多阻。但卦辞强调'穷则变'——困到极致正是思变的时机。
vernacular_judgment: 亨通，贞，大人吉，无咎，有言不信。
vernacular_image: 泽无水，困，君子以致命遂志。
judgment_en: Oppression. Success. Perseverance brings good fortune. The great person proceeds and succeeds.
image_en:
Lake above, water below—this is Exhaustion;
The nobleman remains firm and does not change the will.

Exhaustion's first—seated and not moving—misfortune—no blame.

The exhaustion's second—"the wine and food is exhausted"—correct—the gentleman is firm, no blame.

The exhaustion's third—"seated on a fallen tree"—sees a snake—misfortune—the gentleman is firm.

Exhaustion's fourth—"arriving at the wine and food"—the gentleman is correct—auspicious—opposition comes.

Exhaustion's fifth—"nose is cut off"—the gentleman is correct—auspicious.

Exhaustion's top—"exhaustion"—misfortune—finally the gentleman laughs, finally the gentleman weeps.
tuanshu_en:
Exhaustion: the lake has no water—dried up, exhausted.
The nobleman remains firm and does not change the will.
Exhaustion in the center—the gentleman is correct and does not change.
Those who are exhausted are not used—how can they accomplish anything?
vernacular_judgment_en: Exhaustion. Success. The gentleman is correct and does not change; there is blame in the end.
vernacular_image_en: Lake above water; the nobleman remains firm and does not change his will.
interpretation_en: A sign of exhaustion and depletion—when resources are exhausted and conditions are difficult. One must maintain firm resolve and wait for better times. The key is perseverance through difficulty.

name: 井
judgment: 井：改邑不改井，无丧无得，往来井井。汔至亦未繘井。羸其瓶，凶。
tuanshu: 巽乎水而上水，井；井养而不穷也。改邑不改井，乃以刚中也。汔至亦未繘井，未有功也。羸其瓶，是以凶也。
image:
木上有水，井；君子以劳民劝相。
井泥不食，下也。旧井无禽，时舍也。
井谷射鲋，无与也。
井渫不食，行恻也。求王明，受福也。
井甃无咎，修井也。
寒泉之食，中正也。
元吉在上，大成也。
interpretation: 木上有水、井养不穷之象。问事喻示稳定长久的资源——井水不汲不饮，井德不穷。人亦当修己以养人。
vernacular_judgment: 改邑不改井，无丧无得，往来井井，汔至亦未繘井，羸其瓶，凶。
vernacular_image: 木上有水，井，君子以劳民劝相。
judgment_en: The Well. The city moves to the temple, but the well does not change. Draw from the well.
image_en:
Water above, wood below—this is The Well;
The nobleman encourages virtue and transforms the people.

The well's first—the well's mud is not drunk—there is no one to use—no blame.

The well's second—"the well shoots"—the turtle is drawn—the gentleman is firm—no blame.

The well's third—"the well is not used"—I could pull up the well but do not—the gentleman knows.

The well's four—four is not "to clean"—auspicious.

The well's five—the well is clear and cold—drink—the gentleman is firm—good fortune.

The well's top—"the well's lid is moved"—auspicious—covering the well is misfortune.
tuanshu_en:
The Well: water is above wood—the wood carries the water.
The nobleman encourages virtue and transforms the people.
The well is deep and the water rises—the multitude is benefited.
The well cannot be moved—cannot be emptied—this is the constant virtue.
vernacular_judgment_en: The Well. It benefits to be correct; changing the city does not change the well—no loss, no gain.
vernacular_image_en: Water above wood; the nobleman encourages virtue and transforms the people.
